REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, PLAINTIFF LADY BENJAMIN CANNON'S NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR A PROTECTIVE ORDER IS CONTINUED TO MARCH 11, 2022. NO LATER THAN 9:00 A.M. ON MARCH 9, 2022 PLAINTIFF SHALL FILE A SUPPLEMENTAL DECLARATION IDENTIFYING EACH DOCUMENT (BY TITLE, DESCRIPTION, ETC.) POTENTIALLY SUBJECT TO "CONFIDENTIALITY/ATTORNEY'S EYES ONLY" DESIGNATION AND THE REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION SUCH DOCUMENT IS RESPONSIVE TO. NO LATER THAN MARCH 9, 2022 BY 5:00 P.M. PARTIES TO MEET AND CONFER REGARDING THE DESIGNATION AND THE FORM OF THE PROTECTIVE ORDER. NO LATER THAN MARCH 10, 2022 BY 9:00 A.M. PARTIES TO FILE A SUPPLEMENTAL BRIEF IDENTIFYING REMAINING ITEMS IN DISPUTE; IF PARTIES CANNOT AGREE ON A JOINT BRIEF, EACH PARTY MAY FILE A SEPARATE BRIEF. BRIEFS SHALL ONLY CONTAIN IDENTIFICATION OF THE DOCUMENT AND THE REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION SUCH DOCUMENT IS RESPONSIVE TO. IF AFTER MEET AND CONFER EFFORTS ANY ITEMS REMAIN IN DISPUTE (OTHER THAN THE FORM OF ORDER) PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL IS TO APPEAR IN PERSON ON MARCH 11, 2022 AT 9:30 A.M. AND BRING COPIES OF EVERY DOCUMENT IN DISPUTE. JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY; CLERK: KENNETH B. HUNT; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

Off Calendar Mar-18-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Davis J. Reilly; Bledsoe, Diestel, Treppa & Crane LLP; 415-981-5411; appearing in person on behalf of defendant Charles Jadallah.

No appearance by plaintiff's counsel.

Mr. Reilly states that he spoke with plaintiff's counsel on the phone this morning after he did not appear at 8:30 am pursuant to the court's tentative ruling, and that plaintiff's counsel informed him that he did not see the court's tentative ruling and would not be appearing today because he is not opposing the motion. The court rules as follows:

NOTICE OF DEFENDANT JADALLAH'S MOTION TO COMPEL MENTAL HEALTH EXAMINATION OF PLAINTIFF LADY BENJAMIN CANNON is granted.

Plaintiff Lady Benjamin Cannon'S Notice Of Motion And Motion For A Protective Order
Off Calendar Mar-11-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Carlos Jato; Law Office of Carlos Jato; 415-771-6174; appearing on behalf of plaintiff Lady Benjamin Cannon.
Jack T. Bussell; Bledsoe Diestel Treppa & Crane LLP; 415-981-5411; appearing on behalf of defendant Charles Jadallah.

The parties meet and confer pursuant to the court's tenative ruling. Parties appear to report status, and state they have will have a joint stipulation drafted and submitted to the court by 2:30 pm today. The court rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF LADY BENJAMIN CANNON'S NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR A PROTECTIVE ORDER is granted per the stipulation of the parties. Protective order executed.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

Plaintiff Lady Benjamin Cannon'S Notice Of Motion And Motion For A Protective Order
Off Calendar Mar-09-2022 Continued To Mar-11-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

PLAINTIFF LADY BENJAMIN CANNON'S NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR A PROTECTIVE ORDER is continued to March 11, 2022. No later than 9:00 a.m. on March 9, 2022 Plaintiff shall file a supplemental declaration identifying each document (by title, description, etc.) potentially subject to "confidentiality/attorney's eyes only" designation and the request for production such document is responsive to. No later than March 9, 2022 by 5:00 p.m. parties to meet and confer regarding the designation and the form of the Protective Order. No later than March 10, 2022 by 9:00 a.m. parties to file a supplemental brief identifying remaining items in dispute; if parties cannot agree on a joint brief, each party may file a separate brief. Briefs shall only contain identification of the document and the request for production such document is responsive to. If after meet and confer efforts any items remain in dispute (other than the form of order) Plaintiff's counsel is to appear in person on March 11, 2022 at 9:30 a.m. and bring copies of every document in dispute.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)
